scenario: akm-workflow adapter validate for the markdown workflow, plus the parseWorkflowProgram correctness result for the YAML program. Mirrors lint/all-types.json's workflowMd + workflowProgramYaml split. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item). The underlying WorkflowLinter (src/commands/lint/*) and parseWorkflowProgram (src/workflows/program/) exist; the adapter wrapper does not.
specSource: docs/architecture/specs/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §6 (workflow validation column: 'placeholder-stub, invalid-workflow-structure'), §2/§5.1 (Diagnostic {file, issue, detail, fixed}).
realWorldSource: AKM-native; mirrors the frozen lint/all-types.json workflowMd (WorkflowLinter) + workflowProgramYaml (parseWorkflowProgram result) split rationale
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. Two distinct correctness surfaces, exactly as the frozen all-types lint golden documents: (1) the MARKDOWN workflow is a real validate/lint path (issues[] from a WorkflowLinter-equivalent — checks placeholder-stub, invalid-workflow-structure); (2) the YAML PROGRAM is NOT a markdown-lint path — its correctness is parseWorkflowProgram's own {ok, program|errors} result (captured under `result` with correctnessCheck='parseWorkflowProgram').

The parsed program's `source` line-position fields (start/end offsets the parser computes) are OMITTED here — a specification golden does not run the parser, so only the semantic shape (ok, name, description, version, step ids + instructions) is pinned. The adapter's captured golden will add the exact positions when it lands.

workflowMd.note: conformant: two well-formed steps (tag, publish) each with instructions; no placeholder-stub, valid structure.

program.name: deploy
program.description: Minimal YAML workflow program (the program form is an AKM extension).

unit.instructions: Upload the artifact and record the deployment.
